title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.

title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
summary: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.

title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
summary: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.

title: From RTX to Spark: NVIDIA Accelerates Gemma 4 for Local Agentic AI

title: New Rowhammer attacks give complete control of machines running Nvidia GPUs
summary: Both GDDRHammer and GeForge hammer GPU memory in ways that compromise the CPU.

title: China's homegrown silicon suppliers gain traction as Nvidia struggles to get its chips into the market — Huawei, Cambricon and more step up to fill crucial market gap
summary: Nvidia's market share in the Chinese data center market has shrunk, with a wealth of options coming from Huawei, Cambricon and more, bringing their total share up to 41%.

title: IBM spruces up its mainframes with new support for modern Arm workloads — firm teams up with Arm to run Arm workloads on IBM Z mainframes
summary: Cloud-native AI and data intensive workloads coming to IBM Z and LinuxONE systems as IBM wants to make its machines more relevant for today's workloads.

title: Amazing $490 Newegg combo includes an AMD Ryzen 5 9600X CPU, 16GB of G.Skill DDR5-6000 RAM, MSI Pro B850-S motherboard, and 240mm MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 AIO CPU cooler — all for under $500
summary: Grab the core components of a new AM5 PC build for under $500. Newegg combo bundle includes a CPU, motherboard, RAM, and AIO CPU cooler.

title: Modders use jumper wires and a custom BIOS to save a damaged RTX 4090 from the trash — resurrected Nvidia gaming GPU loses 4GB of VRAM to overcome terminal PCB sagging
summary: A YouTuber resurrects a damaged RTX 4090 with a bent PCB, using a custom BIOS to disable one of its memory channels, reducing its VRAM to 20GB but stabilizing it in the process.

title: Intel buys back 49% stake in Ireland Fab Joint Venture — takes full control over Fab 34
summary: In a mutually beneficial deal, Intel repurchases 49% of Fab 34 from Apollo for $14.2 billion, reducing pressure on its margins, but paying a hefty $3 billion premium to the financial company.

title: Why Nvidia just poured $2 billion into AI ASIC competitor Marvell — NVLink Fusion turns into soft ecosystem lock-in
summary: Nvidia has announced that it has invested $2 billion in Marvell and entered a partnership through NVLink Fusion.

title: Global semiconductor foundry market hit a record $320 billion in 2025 as TSMC pulled further ahead
summary: The global semiconductor foundry market generated a record $320 billion in revenue in 2025, growing 16% year-over-year, according to Counterpoint Research's Foundry Market Supply Tracker.

title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
summary: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

title: A New Google-Funded Data Center Will Be Powered by a Massive Gas Plant
